product_overview: An AI-based system that ingests legal documents (PDF/DOCX), performs OCR and ML-based analysis to detect clauses, compute a weighted compliance score and Legal Robustness Index (LRI), and surface risk and remediation information on a dashboard. (See System Workflow on page 4 and Core Features on pages 2-3 of the PRD.)
core_goals: Automate legal document analysis and clause detection
Identify missing or risky clauses and quantify legal risk
Compute explainable compliance scores (Legal Robustness Index and Risk Factor)
Provide dashboard output that displays document type, compliance score, risk and missing clauses
Keep processing fast (<10s per document), scalable and secure

features.name: Document Upload
features.description: Accepts PDF or image uploads (DOCX support described in PRD) and triggers the OCR + analysis pipeline. This is the primary ingestion endpoint for the system (see 'Document Upload' on page 2).
user_flows: POST /upload with valid PDF or image file (multipart/form-data) -> Receive 200 with JSON {job_id, status:'completed', processed:true, results_summary_url} -> GET /dashboard -> Receive 200 with dashboard HTML including document summary
POST /upload with unsupported file type (e.g., .exe) -> Receive 400 with JSON {error:'unsupported_media_type', message:'Only PDF/DOCX/Images are supported'}
POST /upload with very large file exceeding limits -> Receive 413 Payload Too Large -> Client displays 'file too large' to user

features.name: Text Extraction & Preprocessing (OCR)
features.description: Runs hybrid OCR (Tesseract, PaddleOCR, TrOCR) and preprocessing to extract and normalize text from uploaded documents (see OCR technologies on page 5).
user_flows: POST /upload with scanned PDF -> Receive 200 with JSON {extracted_text: '<text>', ocr_engine:'tesseract|trocr|paddle', ocr_confidence:0.92} -> GET /dashboard -> Receive 200 with dashboard showing extracted text preview

POST /upload with low-quality scan -> Receive 200 with JSON {extracted_text:'', ocr_warnings:['low_confidence'], ocr_confidence:0.15} -> Client prompts user to re-upload clearer document or use a higher-quality source

features.name: Document Type Classification
features.description: Classifies the uploaded document into types such as Employment Agreement, Rental Agreement, Government Tender or NDA (see 'Document Type Classification' on page 2).
user_flows: POST /upload with employment agreement PDF -> Receive 200 with JSON {document_type:'Employment Agreement', type_confidence:0.87} -> GET /dashboard -> Receive 200 with dashboard showing Document Type = 'Employment Agreement'

POST /upload with ambiguous/short document -> Receive 200 with JSON {document_type:'unknown', type_confidence:0.40} -> GET /dashboard -> Receive 200 with dashboard showing 'Needs manual review: document type uncertain'

features.name: Clause Detection Engine
features.description: Detects and extracts key legal clauses (Arbitration, Termination, Payment Terms, Force Majeure, Jurisdiction, etc.) and returns clause locations and text (see Clause Detection Engine on page 2).
user_flows: POST /upload with contract containing clauses -> Receive 200 with JSON {clauses:[{name:'Termination', text:'...', page:5, confidence:0.95}, {name:'Arbitration', text:'...', confidence:0.89}], missing_clauses:[] } -> GET /dashboard -> Receive 200 with dashboard showing detected clauses and links to clause snippets

POST /upload with contract missing key clauses -> Receive 200 with JSON {clauses:[], missing_clauses:['Arbitration','Jurisdiction']} -> GET /dashboard -> Receive 200 with dashboard highlighting missing clauses and suggested next steps

features.name: Weighted Compliance Scoring
features.description: Applies importance weights to detected clauses and computes a compliance score as described in the PRD (see scoring formula on page 3).
user_flows: POST /upload with multiple clauses detected -> Receive 200 with JSON {compliance_score:85.0, total_weight:100, detected_weight:85} -> GET /dashboard -> Receive 200 with dashboard showing Compliance Score = 85 (Legally Structured)

POST /upload with minimal clause coverage -> Receive 200 with JSON {compliance_score:45.0, total_weight:100, detected_weight:45} -> GET /dashboard -> Receive 200 with dashboard showing Compliance Score = 45 (High Legal Risk)

features.name: Penalty Detection Module
features.description: Identifies missing mandatory clauses, excessive penalty conditions, outdated legal references and unbalanced obligations (see Penalty Detection on page 3).
user_flows: POST /upload with clauses that contain excessive penalty language -> Receive 200 with JSON {penalties:[{clause:'Penalty Clause', issue:'excessive_penalty', severity:'high'}]} -> GET /dashboard -> Receive 200 with dashboard listing penalty issues and suggested review items

POST /upload with outdated IPC references -> Receive 200 with JSON {penalties:[{clause:'Legal References', issue:'outdated_ipc_reference', severity:'medium'}]} -> GET /dashboard -> Receive 200 with dashboard showing flagged references and recommended updates

features.name: Risk Assessment Engine
features.description: Calculates the Legal Robustness Index (LRI) and Risk Factor (Risk = 100 − LRI) based on compliance scoring and penalties (see Risk formulas on page 3 and workflow on page 4).
user_flows: POST /upload with computed compliance score -> Receive 200 with JSON {lri:82, risk:18} -> GET /dashboard -> Receive 200 with dashboard presenting LRI and Risk Factor numerically and visually

POST /upload where scoring pipeline fails (internal error) -> Receive 500 with JSON {error:'risk_assessment_failed', message:'Unable to compute LRI'} -> GET /dashboard -> Receive 200 with dashboard showing 'Analysis incomplete: risk assessment failed' state

features.name: Compliance Classification
features.description: Classifies documents into categories using thresholds: Legally Structured (80–100), Needs Review (60–79), High Legal Risk (<60) as defined in the PRD (see page 3).
user_flows: POST /upload producing compliance_score 88 -> Receive 200 with JSON {compliance_score:88, classification:'Legally Structured'} -> GET /dashboard -> Receive 200 with dashboard showing green status and classification details

POST /upload producing compliance_score 65 -> Receive 200 with JSON {compliance_score:65, classification:'Needs Review'} -> GET /dashboard -> Receive 200 with dashboard showing yellow status and recommended clause checks

features.name: Dashboard Output & Web UI
features.description: Serves index and dashboard pages and presents structured output: document type, compliance score, risk level, missing clauses and reasons for risk (see Dashboard Output on page 3 and UI files).
user_flows: GET / -> Receive 200 with index.html (landing page) -> GET /dashboard -> Receive 200 with dashboard.html showing no-analysis placeholder when no uploads exist
POST /upload with valid document -> Receive 200 with results URL -> GET /dashboard -> Receive 200 with dashboard showing Document Type, Compliance Score, Risk Level and Missing Clauses
GET /dashboard before any upload -> Receive 200 with dashboard HTML and empty state message 'No analyzed documents yet'

features.name: Health Check & System Health
features.description: Provides a lightweight health endpoint to verify OCR availability (Tesseract) and basic service health (see Health on code summary).
user_flows: GET /health -> Receive 200 with JSON {status:'ok', tesseract:'available', version:'<version>'}
GET /health when tesseract not installed -> Receive 500 with JSON {status:'error', component:'tesseract', message:'tesseract not found'}

features.name: Document Upload and OCR Processing
features.description: Hybrid OCR pipeline (Tesseract, PaddleOCR, TrOCR) for uploaded documents

endpoints.description: Upload image or PDF to extract text and legal risks
